soumyajit-sengupta.Name: Soumyajit Sengupta
soumyajit-sengupta.Bio: Creative and detail-oriented Frontend Developer with 3 years of hands-on experience building responsive, high-performance web applications using React.js. Passionate about crafting pixel-perfect UIs and seamless user experiences. A 2022 engineering graduate who quickly adapted to real-world product development cycles.

Projects.Name: ReactCart – E-Commerce UI
Projects.Description: A fully responsive e-commerce frontend built with React.js and Redux Toolkit, featuring product filtering, cart management, and seamless checkout flow with mock API integration.

Projects.Name: DevFolio – Portfolio Builder
Projects.Description: A dynamic portfolio generator for developers built using React and Tailwind CSS. Users fill a form and get a live rendered portfolio page with a shareable link.

Projects.Name: NewsLens – News Aggregator App
Projects.Description: A React-based news aggregator that fetches live articles via NewsAPI, supports category filtering, bookmarking, and dark mode.

Exp1.Description: Worked on enterprise-level React.js applications for a European banking client. Responsible for building reusable UI components, integrating REST APIs, and ensuring cross-browser compatibility.

Exp2.Description: Leading frontend development for a SaaS-based HR platform. Architecting scalable React component libraries, implementing Redux state management, and collaborating closely with UI/UX designers and backend teams.

subhrojoti-nag.Name: Subhrojoti Nag
subhrojoti-nag.Bio: Enthusiastic and self-driven MERN Stack Developer with 2 years of professional experience building end-to-end web applications. A 2022 graduate with a strong foundation in both frontend and backend technologies, comfortable working across the entire development lifecycle from database design to deploying production-ready apps.

Projects.Name: JobNest – Job Portal Platform
Projects.Description: A full-stack MERN job portal where employers can post jobs and candidates can apply. Features include JWT-based auth, role-based dashboards, resume upload, and real-time application status tracking.

Projects.Name: ChatSphere – Real-Time Chat App
Projects.Description: A real-time chat application built with MERN stack and Socket.io. Supports private messaging, group rooms, online status indicators, and message read receipts.

Projects.Name: ExpenseTracker API
Projects.Description: A RESTful backend API built with Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB for tracking personal expenses. Includes category-wise filtering, monthly summaries, and secure JWT authentication.

Exp1.Role: Full Stack Developer Intern → Junior Developer
Exp1.Description: Started as a Full Stack Intern and transitioned to a Junior Developer role. Built and maintained learning management system (LMS) features using MERN stack, developed backend APIs, and contributed to student-facing dashboards.

Exp2.Description: Working on internal enterprise tools and client-facing web portals using MERN stack. Responsible for API development, MongoDB schema design, React frontend integration, and performance optimization of existing services.
